description:
2 Dedicated Courts
Open in Fall of 2023
The main entrance is on Gates Street, where off street, angle parking is available as well as a parking lot with handicapped accessibility. Kohler Street and Hilltop Dr. provides another entrance and Portage Street provides three entrances.

There is no scheduled play.  First come, first serve.

description:
Courts open to play on 8:30 AM to Dusk
Team Reach: Westside Outdoor Group; Code: WOPG
Team Reach for Beginners Group: MPBEGIN
 
Opened in July 2024

There are four dedicated pickleball courts with fencing for all four courts.   The courts look very nice.  

There are also five new tennis courts.  Three of the five are lined for pickleball so you can have up to 6 courts with rolling nets.    There are 6 rolling nets on the side of the courts. Given this, if rolling nets were put on the courts, you could have a total of 10 courts.   The Fairview Park HS tennis players take precedence for playing on the tennis courts.

A paddle rack to organize order of play of player waiting was installed.  The older can take up to 19 paddled.

Restrooms are open when Splash Park is open.

name: The Pickle Lodge North Shore
description:
Welcome to The Pickle Lodge — where pickleball passion and top-notch indulgence collide. Here, you won’t just play pickleball; you’ll live it. With 17 dedicated, individually-fenced indoor courts and 6 more outdoors, we’re redefining the game and the entire experience. Designed by players, for players, every detail was built with your perfect day on the court in mind.

But the Lodge is more than courts—it’s community, connection, and celebration. Our conference rooms are the ideal backdrop for private gatherings or corporate parties, offering a unique space where business meets play. And with a full team of pros and instructors on site daily, your game will sharpen while your fun multiplies. (Bonus: memberships aren’t required—you can jump right into the action, no strings attached.)

Worked up an appetite? Drift over to Two Cities Pizza, where salads, sandwiches, pizzas, calzones, and wings keep hunger at bay. Need to quench your thirst? Erne’s Pickle Bar has you covered with 18 rotating beer taps, plus an impressive lineup of cans, seltzers, ciders, wine, and spirits.

So grab your paddle, fuel up, kick back, and soak in the good vibes. At The Pickle Lodge, you’ll find the ultimate pickleball and dining experience—your new favorite hangout both on and off the court.
open_play_schedule: Rated Open Play Sessions Start at 7AM Daily
